pageContext.name: Wolverine vs Sabretooth
pageContext.description: Your fancy claws can't cut what they can't hit. An' your hotsy-totsy healing factor ... won't save you ... when I rip out your heart!   Sideshow presents the Wolverine vs Sabretooth Fine Art Print, a fearsome Marvel art print by Julian Totino Tedesco.  The Wolverine vs Sabretooth Fine Art Print features half brothers Logan Howlett and Victor Creed as they face off in an unforgiving frozen forest. Wolverine leaps into the air with a snarl, his Adamantium claws extended. Ready to strike his opponent out of the sky is Sabretooth, teeth bared in fury.  Each Wolverine vs Sabretooth Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Sideshow logo as part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Inspired by the dynamic tableau achieved by pairing together the Wolverine and Sabretooth Premium Format™ Figures by Sideshow, this X-Men art is available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation to allow for different display options alongside the statues.  Hey, bub — don't miss the chance to add the Wolverine vs Sabretooth Fine Art Print by Julian Totino Tedesco to your Marvel art collection today.
